data.biography: At the age of 21, Honorine Magnier joined the Cochet course. She stayed there for two years. During this period, she had her first theatrical experiences, notably in Le Malade imaginaire , directed by René Camoin where she played Angélique . She will then spend a year at the Sudden workshops. While she has just passed the competition for the Studio-théâtre d'Asnières , Honorine Magnier prefers to accept the role of Valentine in the play Lady Oscar alongside Amanda Lear , and begins a long tour. She then goes on to perform roles intelevision series , such as My Worst Anguish or Les Petits Meurtres by Agatha Christie and in short films. After a new stint in the theater in the play Nelson , where she crosses paths with Chantal Ladesou and Armelle , Honorine Magnier was chosen in 2017 to play Rose Orsini in the TF1 series, Research Section. After having played in 28 episodes, she left the series in 2021 and then joined the cast of Tomorrow belongs to us on the same channel.
data.name: Honorine Magnier

data.biography: Shun Horie (堀江 瞬, Horie Shun, May 25, 1993) is a Japanese voice actor born in Osaka. He won the Best New Actor Award at the 12th Seiyu Awards. He is affiliated with Raccoon Dog and member of SparQlew. Previously, he was affiliated with Pro-Fit until March 2022.
data.name: Shun Horie

data.biography: Shun Horie (堀江 瞬, Horie Shun, 25 de mayo de 1993) es un actor de voz (seiyuu) japonés nacido en la prefectura de Osaka. Ganó el premio al Mejor Actor Revelación en los 12.º Seiyu Awards. Está afiliado a Raccoon Dog y es miembro de SparQlew. Anteriormente, estuvo afiliado a Pro-Fit hasta marzo de 2022.
data.name: Shun Horie

data.biography:
대한민국의 배우.

연극과 영화를 오가면서 필모그래피를 쌓다가 드라마 '슬기로운 의사생활'의 허선빈 역, 이후 드라마 '이상한 변호사 우영우'의 최수연 역을 연기하면서 이름을 알리기 시작했다.

과거 고등학교 2학년 때 입시 준비를 하면서부터 연기를 시작했다고 한다. 평소 체육과 미술 등 예체능 계열을 좋아했지만 진로 고민을 하던 중 영화와 공연을 많이 보러 다녔던 자신이 연기에 관심이 있다는 것을 알게 되면서 연극을 해보고 싶어서 부모님을 설득하였지만 반대했다고 한다.

본가가 일산이고 부모님은 일부러 고생하면 포기할 것이라 생각하여 서울에 있는 학원까지 보냈지만 생각보다 너무 잘하고 있어서 놀랐고 학원 시험에서도 좋은 성적을 얻어 오히려 본인의 꿈을 지지해주기 시작했다고 한다.

이후 2015년 연극으로 데뷔하였고, 이후에는 영화 '소셜포비아' 에서 처음으로 주연을 맡으며 상업영화에 출연하였으며, 독립영화 쪽에서 활발하게 연기 활동을 하였다.
data.name: 하윤경

data.biography:
Gabriel Leone Coutinho Miranda Frota é um ator brasileiro.

Gabriel começou a carreira com 16 anos enquanto estava no colégio, entrou numa peça de teatro onde foi convocado a entrar na companhia de teatro "Cia. Teatral Notre Dame" do diretor da peça, permaneceu na cia de 2009 até 2013, atuando nesses anos em seis peças da Cia como A Megera Domada, Bailei na Curva e A Vida é Sonho. Em seguida, atuou em espetáculos musicais, como Rapsódia de Liane Maya e viveu o rei Roberto Carlos em Chacrinha de Andrucha Waddington.

Em 2013, estreia na televisão numa participação na série A Grande Família e em seguida na Malhação, mas foi em Verdades Secretas que ficou conhecido pelo público no papel de Gui, um jovem rico sustentado pelos pais. Em 2016 viveu seu primeiro protagonista no horário nobre, Miguel de Sá Ribeiro em Velho Chico, o filho de Tereza, papel de Camila Pitanga. Em 2017, entra pra supersérie Os Dias Eram Assim, vivendo o revolucionário Gustavo Reis. Em outubro de 2018, começa a rodar o filme Meu Álbum de Amores, uma comédia romântica musical de Rafael Gomes, no papel principal do dentista Júlio.
data.name: Gabriel Leone

data.biography: Gabriel Leone Coutinho Miranda Frota (Rio de Janeiro, July 21, 1993) is Brazilian actor who has worked in television and film.

data.biography: Kaia Jordan Gerber is an American model and actress. After starring in a series of ad campaigns for fashion brands since debuting at Fashion Week in 2017, Gerber won Model of the Year at the British Fashion Awards in 2018. As an actress, she has appeared in supporting roles in the films Bottoms (2023) and Saturday Night (2024). She is the second child and only daughter of the supermodel Cindy Crawford and the businessman Rande Gerber.
data.name: Kaia Gerber

data.biography: Sampath Raj Kumar (born 15 January 1976) is an Indian film actor who works primarily in the Tamil film industry. He is quite popular in the Telugu , Malayalam and Kannada film industries. His mother tongue is Tamil. He is best known for appearing in each film of director Venkat Prabhu's comedy trilogy, consisting of Chennai 600028, Saroja and Goa. He has also acted in supporting roles in various other films.

data.biography:
Sydney Taylor a fait ses débuts à la télévision en 2017 avec une apparition dans la série Nashville, où elle incarnait une élève de quatrième.

En 2018, elle a obtenu un rôle récurrent dans la série Splitting Up Together diffusée sur ABC, où elle incarnait Bronwyn.

En 2020, Taylor a joué le rôle de Lexi Hamilton dans la série Amazon Prime Just Add Magic: Mystery City, une série dérivée de la série originale Just Add Magic.

En 2023, elle s'est fait connaître du grand public grâce à son rôle d'Amelia dans la série Disney+ American Born Chinese. La série est basée sur le roman graphique du même nom de Gene Luen Yang, et le personnage de Taylor, Amelia, est décrit comme une fille « typiquement américaine » sympathique, camarade de classe et béguin de Jin.

En janvier 2023, il a été annoncé qu'elle avait été choisie pour jouer dans Marked Men : Rule + Shaw, un film romantique pour jeunes adultes basé sur le livre Rule de Jay Crownover. Elle y tiendra le rôle principal féminin de Shaw Landon. Le tournage du film s'est achevé fin 2022] Le film a fait l'objet d'une sortie en salles très limitée plus de deux ans plus tard, le 22 janvier 2025.
data.name: Sydney Taylor

Arkadaşlarıyla vakit geçirmekten hoşlanan Lucas, beyzbol ve futbolu sevmektedir. Adler'in 4 Şubat 2026 itibariyle Instagram'da 217 takipçisi bulunmaktadır.
Jon Øigarden is a Norwegian actor.
data.name: Jon Øigarden

data.biography: Jon Øigarden (født 31. mai 1971 i Oslo) er en norsk skuespiller. Han er utdannet ved Statens teaterhøgskole, og har deltatt i flere filmer og skuespill. Han var også med i komiserien Lyckliga gatan, både som skuespiller og manusforfatter. Han var også frontfigur i komiserien Endelig fredag på TV 2. Øigarden har han spilt en av hovedrollene i dramaserien Mammon på NRK, samt en større birolle i komiserien Helt perfekt på TVNorge.
data.name: Jon Øigarden

data.biography: Jon Øigarden (* 31. Mai 1971 in Oslo) ist ein norwegischer Schauspieler. Bekannt wurde er vor allem durch seine Rollen als Journalist Peter Verås in der Fernsehserie „Mammon“ und als Jarl Varg in „Norsemen“. Von 2019 bis 2023 spielte er Jeppe Schøitt in der Serie „Exit“, die das dekadente Leben von vier Männern aus der Finanzelite Oslos beschreibt und zur meistgestreamten Serie im norwegischen Fernsehen wurde. Øigarden wurde an der Norwegischen Nationalakademie für Theater ausgebildet und war sowohl auf der Bühne als auch im Film und Fernsehen aktiv. Zu seinen weiteren bekannten Werken zählen „22. Juli“, „A Somewhat Gentle Man“, „Norwegian Ninja“ und „Ein Sturm zu Weihnachten“.

Tyler Perry (born Emmitt Perry, Jr.; September 13, 1969) is an African-American actor, director, playwright, screenwriter, producer, author, songwriter., and entrepreneur.

Already a successful artist in Southern theater, Perry began to make national celebrity status in 2005 with the release of his first film, Diary of a Mad Black Woman. He has won critical praise for playing Madea, a mentally strong woman who handles adversity with optimism and happiness; his critically acclaimed portrayal of her in the award-winning "Madea" series has caused him to be one of the most respected black actors in Hollywood.

He has produced multiple TV series as well as films, started a multiple year partnership with OWN (Oprah Winfrey Network), and opened his own film studio, Tyler Perry Studios, in Georgia.

Perry was included in Time's list of the 100 most influential people of 2020. In 2022, he was inducted into the Black Music & Entertainment Walk of Fame.
data.name: Tyler Perry

data.biography:
Tyler Perry (* 13. September 1969 in New Orleans, Louisiana als Emmitt Perry, Jr.) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler, Film- und Fernsehregisseur, Drehbuchautor und Filmproduzent.  Perry genießt in den USA durch seine Filme, insbesondere durch die Serie Meet the Browns, enorme Popularität. Bekannt wurde er durch die Darstellung der Figur Madea, die Perry seit 2005 auch in mehreren Filmen verkörperte. 2011 nannte ihn das Forbes Magazine mit einem Einkommen von 130 Millionen US-Dollar zwischen Mai 2010 und 2011 den höchstverdienenden Künstler in der Unterhaltungsbranche.

Als Regisseur, Schauspieler, Drehbuchautor und Produzent arbeitet er ebenso für das Fernsehen wie auch für das Kino.

Perry wurde für zahlreiche Preise nominiert und 2011 mit dem NAACP Image Award ausgezeichnet. Im Jahr zuvor erhielt er mit dem Chairman's Award den Ehrenpreis.

Am 1. Oktober 2019 erhielt er einen Stern auf dem Walk of Fame in Hollywood.

Quelle: Wikipedia

泰勒·佩里（Tyler Perry，出生于小埃米特·佩里;1969 年 9 月 13 日）是一位非裔美国演员、导演、剧作家、编剧、制片人、作家、词曲作者和企业家。

佩里已经是南方剧院的一位成功的艺术家，2005年，随着他的第一部电影《疯狂黑人女人的日记》的上映，他开始成为全国名人。他因扮演玛德亚而赢得了评论界的赞誉，玛德是一个精神坚强的女性，以乐观和快乐的态度应对逆境;他在屡获殊荣的“Madea”系列中对她的刻画广受好评，使他成为好莱坞最受尊敬的黑人演员之一。

他制作了多部电视剧和电影，与 OWN（奥普拉温弗瑞网络）建立了多年的合作伙伴关系，并在佐治亚州开设了自己的电影工作室 Tyler Perry Studios。

佩里被《时代》杂志评为 2020 年最具影响力的 100 人。2022年，他入选黑人音乐与娱乐星光大道。
data.name: 泰勒·佩里

data.biography:
Tyler Perry (ur. Emmitt Perry Jr.; 13 września 1969) jest afroamerykańskim aktorem, reżyserem, dramaturgiem, scenarzystą, producentem, autorem, autorem tekstów piosenek i przedsiębiorcą.

Już jako odnoszący sukcesy artysta w teatrze południowym, Perry zaczął zdobywać krajowy status gwiazdy w 2005 roku, kiedy ukazał się jego pierwszy film, Z pamiętnika wściekłej żony. Zdobył uznanie krytyków za rolę Madei, silnej psychicznie kobiety, która radzi sobie z przeciwnościami losu z optymizmem i szczęściem; jego doceniona przez krytyków kreacja w nagradzanej serii „Madea” sprawiła, że ​​stał się jednym z najbardziej szanowanych czarnoskórych aktorów w Hollywood.

Wyprodukował wiele seriali telewizyjnych, a także filmów, rozpoczął wieloletnią współpracę z OWN (Oprah Winfrey Network) i otworzył własne studio filmowe, Tyler Perry Studios, w Georgii.

Perry znalazł się na liście 100 najbardziej wpływowych osób 2020 roku magazynu Time. W 2022 roku został wprowadzony do Alei Sław Muzyki i Rozrywki Czarnej.

泰勒·佩裏（Tyler Perry，出生於小埃米特·佩裏; 1969 年 9 月 13 日）是一位非裔美國演員、導演、劇作家、編劇、製片人、作家、詞曲作者和企業家。

佩裏已經是南方劇院的一位成功的藝術家，2005 年，隨著他的第一部電影《瘋狂黑人女人的日記》的上映，他開始成為全國名人。他因扮演瑪德亞而贏得了評論界的讚譽，瑪德是一個精神堅強的女性，以樂觀和快樂的態度應對逆境; 他在屢獲殊榮的“Madea”系列中對她的刻畫廣受好評，使他成為好萊塢最受尊敬的黑人演員之一。

他製作了多部電視劇和電影，與 OWN（奧普拉温弗瑞網絡）建立了多年的合作夥伴關係，並在佐治亞州開設了自己的電影工作室 Tyler Perry Studios。

佩裏被《時代》雜誌評為 2020 年最具影響力的 100 人。2022 年，他入選黑人音樂與娛樂星光大道。
data.name: 泰勒·佩裏
